name: SaveAction
description: Saves an action to history when user approves and executes (e.g. resume service). Call after ResumeAppRunnerService succeeds to log the action.

rationale.description: Why the action was taken (e.g. User approved resume of paused service)

name: GetActions
description: Gets action history. Use when user asks about past actions – provide context 'I have already performed similar actions' with details.

name: GetIncidents
description: Gets incidents from the incident log. Use fetch_all=true when user asks for ALL incidents. Otherwise use limit (default 10).

limit.description: Max incidents to return (default 10). Ignored if fetch_all=true.

fetch_all.description: Set to true or 'all' to fetch ALL incidents. Use when user says 'all incidents', 'show everything', 'full history'.
